title: RGCB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I Posts
description: The Rajiv Gandhi Center for Biotechnology (RGCB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Associate I post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation and M.Sc. can apply for the RGCB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the educational details, age limit, selection proc...
